overview: A full-featured digital marketing and e-commerce storefront with product catalog, shopping cart, Stripe checkout, About and Contact pages, and order management — all in a fast, responsive, visually polished design.
features: Home page with hero, featured products, and testimonials
Shop page with product grid, search, and category filters
Product detail pages with image gallery and Add to Cart
Shopping cart with live item count badge and persisted state
Checkout with Stripe debit/credit card payment
About page with company story and values
Contact page with form, phone, fax, email, Twitter and Facebook
User accounts and login via Internet Identity
